name: Rocket Technologies International (RTI)
description: Australian aerospace and defence technology company. Operates RTI Helidon Energetix & Test Complex. Specializes in rocket propulsion, energetics, and defence systems.
facilities: RTI Helidon Energetix & Test Complex (Queensland, Australia)
key_events: Signed Strategic Collaboration Agreement with Weststar Defence Industries at National Convention Centre, Canberra (July 2026)
